name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN.E|New Must-Hit Bomb💣
Elegant & Chic🔥
Exclusive imported original leather, absolutely not the domestic leather hype on the market⚡️
24 SS Show Piece Lola, fluid line design, sweet yet cool, wear with a suit to be a workplace queen! Daily matching is also a surefire eye-catcher! Calfskin, lambskin lining, silver finish, shoulder carry
TRIOMPHE metal clasp, 1 main interior pocket, 1 flat interior pocket
Adjustable shoulder strap: Shortest length {21cm}, Longest length {28cm}
Size: 28x12x5CM
Model No.: 115533
